name: @feed/mcp
description: Feed MCP Protocol - Model Context Protocol server implementation

scripts.lint: cd ../.. && bunx @biomejs/biome check --config-path ../../biome.json --files-ignore-unknown=true --no-errors-on-unmatched packages/mcp/package.json packages/mcp/tsconfig.json packages/mcp/src
scripts.typecheck: cd ../.. && bun run tsc -p packages/api --emitDeclarationOnly --noCheck && bun run tsc -p packages/a2a --emitDeclarationOnly --noCheck && bun run tsc -p packages/mcp --noEmit
